items.title: Feature: Allow admins to reset user password from the admin panel
items.description: Requestor: Ryan Pfister Summary: Allow admins and supervisors to request a reset password to a users assigned email from the admin panel. Also when creating a user for the first time, allow the creator to send a temporary password to the user to log into for the first time, then have them change it. Problem to Solve: Password Issues Workflow / Use Case: Alternate Ideas:

items.title: Feature: Officer / General View event from unit monitor
items.description: Requestor: J. Garcia Summary: Allow accounts to click on the event from the unit monitor to get details about it, not just from the event monitor. Problem to Solve: Allow users to easily view events. Workflow / Use Case: Alternate Ideas:

items.title: Memo Print
items.description: When printing the memo book, the officer name should be displayed on the print out

items.title: Multiple Units
items.description: If multiple units are signed in as the same callsign (for example 2 201's) dont allow it, allow the officer who is signing in to kick the other 201 off, but give them an option in case they forgot to sign out. Also sometimes we have two units riding in 1 car, allow this to happen as well.

items.title: Add Email Server
items.description: Add email server for email reports, daily reports, new users creations, password reset, send a email to the user when the account is first created to setup a password, etc.

items.title: Force Unit Signoff - Memo Book
items.description: If we force a unit to sign off, and they dont complete their memo book, make it so that a supervisor knows its incomplete in the review tab, and allow the officer to complete it next time they sign in.

items.title: Audit log showing 127.0.0.1
items.description: Also we need to update the audit logs to update with all the new stuff we added. As well as the ip of the user in the audit log is localhost (127.0.0.1)

items.title: Memo book force logoff
items.description: If we force a unit to sign off, and they dont complete their memo book, make it so that a supervisor knows its incomplete in the review tab, and allow the officer to complete it next time they sign in.

items.title: Needs assistance
items.description: If someone's status is changed to "need assistance (10-1), maybe an alert tone to all units and dispatch

items.title: Pop up notification
items.description: Pop up notification with sound for assigned calls to any officer assigned

comments.author: ryanpfister
comments.body: This issue has been fixed / implemented.

items.title: Create noted with status's
items.description: General - Add the ability to create notes with statuses, mainly when not assigned to a call, so if someone says they are on a personal or taking a 12 (return to town hall) per 104, you can put "PER 104" and its visible on the unit monitor.

comments.author: ryanpfister
comments.body: This has been complete with commit claude/brookhaven-cad-system-NK6yM

items.title: Change Status
items.description: General- Change statuses to Available (green), assigned or dispatched (yellow), enroute (blue), on scene (orange), unavailable (white), 10-18 (meal) (teal), 10-12 (returning to town hall) (brown), out of service (purple), and needs assistance (red)

comments.author: ryanpfister
comments.body: This has been added to the project. The commit brookhaven-cad-system-NK6yM solved this issue
